Module exports for logging.
Aggregates lifecycle-related component modules.
Module facade for health events.
Aggregator for health type definitions.

Command for requesting damage application to an entity.
Aggregate module re-exporting all engine role tags.
Component for tracking entity health.
Per-frame context passed to systems during game loop updates.
Component for tracking the last entity that attacked this entity.
Central game state container for entities, resources, and the active level.
Central manager for scoped loggers with configurable sinks.
Simple synchronous logger with configurable output sinks.
Abstract interface for log output destinations.
Log sink that writes to stdout.
Tag component marking an entity as dead.
Tag component indicating an active entity.
Tag component indicating an inactive entity.
Component for scheduling delayed activation of other components.
High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.
Versioned handle for referencing entities in an EntityPool.
Type alias for entity version numbers used in handle validation.
Event emitted when an entity's health changes.
Event emitted when an entity dies.
Context data describing a health change applied to an entity.
Context struct describing a generic entity-to-entity interaction.

Bitmask flags controlling the response when health reaches zero.

Strongly-typed identifier for prefab templates.
Tag type for identifying CommandBuffer-role classes at compile time.

Tag type for identifying Manager-role classes at compile time.
Lightweight view for iterating entities with specific components.

Type-indexed registry for engine resources with O(1) lookup.
Type-safe event bus for inter-system communication within the game loop.
Defines the Level class representing a game level or stage.
Immutable snapshot of viewport state for frame-consistent rendering.
Immutable snapshot of input state at a specific point in time.
